question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $70,000 on April 20?

payload.main_thesis: BTC being roughly 6.5% above 70,000 with five days left makes Yes likely, but the market is somewhat too confident because settlement depends on one exact Binance noon-ET 1-minute close.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified in the title.

unresolved_ambiguities: How stable BTC will remain over the next five days.
